ddls:
CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user registered on the platform */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Short biography of the user */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL of the user's profile picture */,
  "header_image_url" TEXT /* URL of the user's header image */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the user */,
  "website_url" TEXT /* Website URL of the user */,
  "joined_date" TEXT /* Date when the user joined the platform */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tweets" (
  "tweet_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tweet */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the tweet was created */,
  "tweet" TEXT /* Content of the tweet */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user who posted the tweet */,
  "retweets_count" INTEGER /* Number of retweets */,
  "likes_count" INTEGER /* Number of likes */,
  "replies_count" INTEGER /* Number of replies */,
  "tweet_type" TEXT /* Type of tweet (e.g., text, image, video) */,
  "is_pinned" INTEGER /* Whether the tweet is pinned to the user's profile */,
  "is_deleted" INTEGER /* Whether the tweet is deleted */,
  "deleted_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the tweet was deleted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tweet_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tweets_username FOREIGN KEY ("username") REFERENCES users ("username")
)

CREATE TABLE "hashtags" (
  "hashtag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hashtag */,
  "hashtag" TEXT /* The hashtag text */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the hashtag was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hashtag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cashtags" (
  "cashtag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cashtag */,
  "cashtag" TEXT /* The cashtag text representing a specific cryptocurrency */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the cashtag was created */,
  "cryptocurrency_name" TEXT /* Name of the cryptocurrency */,
  "cryptocurrency_symbol" TEXT /* Symbol of the cryptocurrency */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cashtag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tweet_hashtags" (
  "tweet_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tweet */,
  "hashtag_id" INTEGER /* ID of the hashtag associated with the tweet */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tweet_id", "hashtag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tweet_cashtags" (
  "tweet_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tweet */,
  "cashtag_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cashtag associated with the tweet */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tweet_id", "cashtag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics record */,
  "tweet_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tweet the analytics is related to */,
  "engagement_type" TEXT /* Type of engagement (e.g., retweets, likes, replies) */,
  "engagement_count" INTEGER /* Count of the engagement for the tweet */,
  "recorded_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the analytics were recorded */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the analytics period */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the analytics period */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_tweet_id FOREIGN KEY ("tweet_id") REFERENCES tweets ("tweet_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tweet_engagements" (
  "engagement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each engagement event */,
  "tweet_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tweet being engaged with */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who engaged with the tweet */,
  "engagement_type" TEXT /* Type of engagement (e.g., retweet, like, reply) */,
  "engagement_date" TEXT /* Date of the engagement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("engagement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tweet_engagements_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tweet_engagements_tweet_id FOREIGN KEY ("tweet_id") REFERENCES tweets ("tweet_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_followers" (
  "follow_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each follow event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user being followed */,
  "follower_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who followed */,
  "followed_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the follow event occurred */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("follow_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_followers_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_followers_follower_id FOREIGN KEY ("follower_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_blocks" (
  "block_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each block event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who blocked */,
  "blocked_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the blocked user */,
  "blocked_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the block event occurred */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("block_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_blocks_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_blocks_blocked_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("blocked_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the notification */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., mention, reply, like) */,
  "tweet_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tweet related to the notification */,
  "mentioned_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user mentioned in the tweet */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the notification was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_tweet_id FOREIGN KEY ("tweet_id") REFERENCES tweets ("tweet_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_mentioned_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("mentioned_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cryptocurrency_prices" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each price record */,
  "cryptocurrency_symbol" TEXT /* Symbol of the cryptocurrency */,
  "price" TEXT /* Price of the cryptocurrency */,
  "price_date" TEXT /* Date of the price record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cryptocurrency_market_data" (
  "market_data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market data record */,
  "cryptocurrency_symbol" TEXT /* Symbol of the cryptocurrency */,
  "market_cap" TEXT /* Market capitalization of the cryptocurrency */,
  "volume" TEXT /* Trading volume of the cryptocurrency */,
  "circulating_supply" TEXT /* Circulating supply of the cryptocurrency */,
  "recorded_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the market data was recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("market_data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cryptocurrency_market_data_cryptocurrency_symbol FOREIGN KEY ("cryptocurrency_symbol") REFERENCES cashtags ("cryptocurrency_symbol")
)

CREATE TABLE "tweet_sentiments" (
  "sentiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sentiment record */,
  "tweet_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tweet being analyzed */,
  "sentiment" TEXT /* Sentiment of the tweet (e.g., positive, negative, neutral) */,
  "confidence" TEXT /* Confidence level of the sentiment analysis */,
  "analyzed_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the sentiment was analyzed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sentiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tweet_sentiments_tweet_id FOREIGN KEY ("tweet_id") REFERENCES tweets ("tweet_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tweet_topics" (
  "topic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each topic record */,
  "tweet_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tweet being analyzed */,
  "topic" TEXT /* Topic extracted from the tweet */,
  "relevance" TEXT /* Relevance of the topic to the tweet */,
  "extracted_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the topic was extracted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("topic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tweet_topics_tweet_id FOREIGN KEY ("tweet_id") REFERENCES tweets ("tweet_id")
)
